other_observers: none; yes, I was the original and only observer
description: A small vireo, yellow below and greenish-gray above, brightest yellow on the breast. A dark gray cap, dark eyeline extending to the lores. The bird was small billed and round headed compared to Warbling Vireo.Behaviors: flitting around in a small flock of chickadees and warblersCall: nonePlumage: fall
